items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for an Engineering Manager to lead our Frontend team. You will manage a team of 6-8 frontend engineers, driving the technical direction of our web application while ensuring your team members are growing, engaged, and doing the best work of their careers.

This is a people-first leadership role. While you will participate in architectural decisions and occasionally write code, your primary focus will be on team health, delivery execution, and cross-functional collaboration.

Responsibilities

  • Lead, mentor, and grow a team of frontend engineers through regular 1:1s, career development, and performance feedback
  • Partner with Product and Design to plan sprints, manage scope, and deliver on commitments
  • Drive technical strategy for the frontend, including framework choices, testing practices, and performance standards
  • Remove blockers, manage dependencies, and ensure smooth delivery across teams
  • Recruit and hire top frontend talent to grow the team
  • Foster a culture of quality, collaboration, and continuous improvement

Requirements

  • 8+ years of software engineering experience, with 2+ years managing engineers
  • Strong technical background in frontend development (React, TypeScript, CSS)
  • Experience managing teams of 5+ engineers in an agile environment
  • Track record of developing and retaining engineering talent
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience managing remote or distributed teams
  • Background in design systems and accessibility at scale
  • Experience with Next.js, Astro, or similar modern web frameworks
